name: Pumpkin Spice Bread
recipeIngredient: Unbleached white flour or Whole-wheat pastry flour
Old-fashioned rolled oats or low-fat Granola or shredded bran cereal
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Coat a 1 1/2-quart loaf pan with cooking spray and lightly dust with flour.
3. Shake out excess flour.
4. In a large bowl, combine 1 1/4 cups flour, cinnamon, nutmeg, pumpkin pie spice, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
5. Add dates and oats; toss to coat.
6. Whisk together buttermilk, oil, egg, maple syrup, and pumpkin puree in a separate bowl.
7. Stir in drained raisins.
8. Combine wet and dry ingredients, folding until just incorporated.
9. Spoon batter into prepared pan.
10. Bake for 25 minutes at 400 degrees.
11. Reduce oven temperature to 300 degrees and bake until a wooden pick inserted into the center comes out clean, an additional 15 minutes.
Yield: 1 loaf
